title: canarium pseudosumatranum
intro: Canarium pseudosumatranum is a species of plant in the family Burseraceae, commonly known as the Sumatran canarium. This plant is native to Sumatra, Indonesia, and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Canarium pseudosumatranum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions, such as wounds and infections. The plant's leaves and seeds are often used to prepare herbal remedies, including teas and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
